content.Text: I’m tracing the existing `--nerve` implementation first so the new `--autopsy` path matches the repo’s current CLI/service/formatter pattern exactly. Then I’ll patch the four target files, add the new formatter file, and build the CLI project to catch any integration errors.

`rg` is not available in this environment, so I’m falling back to native PowerShell file search and targeted reads. I’m locating the existing `NerveService`, parser wiring, and formatter methods now so the new command lands with the same structure and conventions.

ToolUse.name: Run Get-ChildItem -Path src/WinSentinel.Cli,src/WinSentinel.Core -Recurse -File | Select-String -Pattern 'nerve|Nerve' | ForEach-Object { "{0}:{1}:{2}" -f $_.Path, $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim() }
